# Integral Stocks

> Real-time stock market dashboard with live quotes, interactive charts, financial news, sector heatmaps, an economic calendar, and a multiplayer paper-trading simulator.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Live quotes, charts, watchlists, and breaking financial news organized by category (markets, tech, crypto, IPOs, earnings).
- [Screeners](/screener): Curated stock screeners — top gainers, losers, most active, undervalued growth, small-cap movers — with sortable columns and price filters.
- [Calendar](/calendar): A personal market calendar for tracking earnings dates, IPOs, dividends, and macro events.
- [Trading Simulator](/sim): Multiplayer paper-trading game with live prices, leaderboards, market/limit/stop orders, and shareable join codes.
- [Sign in](/auth): Account access for the simulator and personal watchlist.
